design_notes: For this casual chart, we focus on a highly spaced, melodic contour map that keeps the player engaged without overwhelming them. Notes are aligned strictly on the integer beat grid to guarantee casual playability. The lanes are balanced to fall strictly within the 22-45% band, satisfying the layout requirements while avoiding mechanical repetition by rising and falling with the lead melody pitch. The single hold note is placed at the end of the phrase on a sustain candidate to meet the 10-20% hold share perfectly.

sections.name: Intro Walk
sections.intent: Introduce basic left-right-center movements along the synth lead.

sections.name: Melodic Rise
sections.intent: Maintain the casual flow while emphasizing pitch peaks.

sections.name: Outro Hold
sections.intent: Resolve the sequence with a relaxing hold note.
